name: PixelOS
tagline: Minimal presentation, quick readability, and easy release scanning.
highlights: Clean layout supports shorter notes without looking sparse.
Ideal for stable release communication and small incremental drops.
Device targeting stays clear even on narrower mobile screens.
changelog: Kept the stable PixelOS lane concise and easy to scan.
Rolled smaller incremental updates into one cleaner public-facing drop.
Preserved quick readability for both Nothing Phone 2a variants.
